title: Changelog Sync + Read API Endpoints
summary: Three Next.js App Router route handlers added to expose the changelog data model via HTTP: a sync endpoint that pulls parsed CHANGELOG.md data from GitHub and persists it, a list endpoint for filtered feature queries, and a detail endpoint for individual feature + entry + code-change retrieval.
business_context: The changelog data model was built in previous tasks but had no HTTP surface. Without these endpoints the sync pipeline and any UI or external consumer cannot interact with the data.
affected_users: All API consumers and UI layers that interact with changelog data
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/projects/:id/changelog/sync fetches and upserts features from GitHub
GET /api/projects/:id/changelog returns paginated, filterable feature list
GET /api/projects/:id/changelog/:featureId returns feature with nested entries and code changes
All three routes enforce auth via resolveAuth
TypeScript reports no errors in the new route files
